notes: Short test: Needs mentioned tweaks to start, seems playable though, crashes on exit.
title: Treadnauts

notes: Game seems to run just fine. The sound is good; Menus are responsive, etc. I don't have anyone to test MP with just yet and I'm personally not a big fan of random MP matches. The tutorial section "windows" still appear blank so it may be best to find a tutorial video or just poke around until you're comfortable. Played two matches with bots and the game worked just fine. Haven't had time to play around with different tweaks.
title: Treadnauts
